follow_up_feature_requests: Refresh doc/DesignNotes.md so the earlier tactical-report section no longer says the current ship-summary defense wording is label/detail-driven and instead matches the final named-defense rollup contract implemented by this feature.
summary: Feature scope is functionally complete across all three subtasks: defense metadata is preserved into report events, ship rollups show only meaningful damage/effects, and hit-detail lines suppress the redundant placeholder suffix. The only remaining issue is a non-blocking internal design-note inconsistency.
